---
title: &TITLE Nisarg Ujjainkar
order: 2
last: Ujjainkar
first: Nisarg
people_group: phdstudent
education: B.T. | IIT Gandhinagar | 2020
subtitle: Ph.D. Student
image: avatar.jpg
listing:
  id: pubs
  template: ../../_ejs/publications-people.ejs 
  contents: 
    - "../../../publications/pubs/*.qmd"
    #- "!../../../publications/_template/"
  sort: "pub_number desc"
  # sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  include:
    author: *TITLE
  fields: [publication, title, categories, image, date, author]
page-layout: full
about: 
  id: about
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  image: avatar.jpg
---

<hr>


:::{#about}



## Education
{{< meta education >}}

<br>

:::

## {{< meta first >}}'s Group Publications

:::{#pubs}
:::
